task: Launch-quality advanced task: Satellite Crop Stress Index Fusion Audit. Reality context: a precision-agriculture client needs field-level drought stress ranking. Embedded packet: metric map: metric1=ndvi_anomaly, metric2=thermal_anomaly_C, metric3=soil_moisture_pct, metric4=cloud_confidence; records: R1 ndvi_anomaly=51.76 thermal_anomaly_C=90.9 soil_moisture_pct=80.3 cloud_confidence=0.85; R2 ndvi_anomaly=72.27 thermal_anomaly_C=77.8 soil_moisture_pct=17.5 cloud_confidence=0.75; R3 ndvi_anomaly=31.38 thermal_anomaly_C=62.8 soil_moisture_pct=26 cloud_confidence=0.75; R4 ndvi_anomaly=59.49 thermal_anomaly_C=89.3 soil_moisture_pct=20.2 cloud_confidence=0.74; limit_ndvi_anomaly=52.28; limit_thermal_anomaly_C=66.9; limit_soil_moisture_pct=38.3; decision_budget_usd=272500; sensitivity_shift_pct=5; hard_threshold_record_count=1; removed_context="career posting emphasized judgment under ambiguous production evidence". Rules and constraints: Compute normalized risk = metric1/limit1 + metric2/limit2 + 0.5*metric3/limit3 - 0.4*metric4/limit4; fail if risk>1.15, warn if 0.95-1.15, pass otherwise. Options or recommendations cannot use external measurements, specialized licensed software, or hidden assumptions; all calculations must use only the embedded packet, and any contradictory or under-supported record must be marked needs_review. Required work: fuse indicators and flag uncertain fields; calculate derived metrics, classify every record, identify the smallest defensible intervention, and write the decision rationale. Deliver crop_stress_fusion.geojson + agronomy_memo.md with formulas or executable logic, record-level citations, validation checks, sensitivity notes, and a final recommendation table suitable for expert review.
